---
title: "Workshop 01 — Day 2"
subtitle: "Monitoring Protocols & Group Discussion"
date: 2024-03-02
---

## Schedule

| Time | Topic | Facilitator |
|---|---|---|
| 09:00 - 09:30 | Recap of Day 1 | Jane Doe |
| 09:30 - 10:30 | Deep Dive: Monitoring Protocols | Jane Doe |
| 10:30 - 10:45 | Break | |
| 10:45 - 12:00 | Group Discussion & Q&A | Maria Lopez |

## Video Recording

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}

## Slides

[View Slides](slides.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

## R Code

```{.r filename="analysis.R"}
library(tidyverse)

# Continue from Day 1
df <- read_csv("data.csv")

df |>
  group_by(species) |>
  summarise(total = sum(count), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(total))
```

[Download R Script](analysis.R){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Reference Document

<iframe src="reference.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Download PDF](reference.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
